sourceSqlDescription: Paste SQL directly or import a local file. The formatter and lint checks update from this source query.
formattedSqlDescription: Dialect-aware SQL formatting runs in your browser with the options below. Copy or download the result when it looks right.
formattedSqlEmptyDescription: Paste or import SQL on the left to preview the formatted output here.
optionsDescription: Control formatting and lint behavior without changing the original query text.
formatSectionDescription: Choose the SQL dialect and layout rules that shape the formatted output.
lintSectionDescription: Turn on the query checks that matter for review, readability, and safer mutations.
maxLineLengthDescription: Set 0 to disable the line-length rule.
lintResultsDescription: Review parse errors, warning-level query risks, and informational style suggestions here.
lintIdleDescription: Paste or import SQL to review parse errors, mutation warnings, and style guidance.
lintCleanDescription: The current query did not trigger any enabled lint rules.
